log.context:
Done. Here is what changed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/timeline.html`:

**1. Tighter minimum spacing** -- Desktop min gap reduced from 100px to 40px, mobile from 40px to 20px. The log-scale algorithm was replaced with a three-tier power curve: sub-hour gaps use `sqrt(hours) * 0.15` (so 30-minute gaps map to only ~15% of the range), 1-4 hour gaps get moderate spread, and 4+ hour gaps use log scale up to max. Events within an hour will now cluster with dots nearly touching.
